title: 桜花賞の後に・次のティアラヘ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has a stunning showing at the Oka
Sho. She's enjoying the intesity of the Tiara tour
races, and how serious her foes are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Narita Brian is gearing up for the
Satsuki Sho, so Hishi Amazon fiercely guns for the
Japanese Oaks to get ahead of her.
